text: وَ قَوْمُ‌ إِبْرَاهِيمَ‌ وَ قَوْمُ‌ لُوطٍ

en.ahmedali: And the people of Abraham and Lot,
en.ahmedraza: And (so did) the people of Ibrahim and the people of Lut.
en.arberry: and the people of Abraham, the people of Lot,
en.daryabadi: And the people of Ibrahim and the people of Lut.
en.hilali: And the people of Ibrahim (Abraham) and the people of Lout (Lot),
en.itani: And the people of Abraham, and the people of Lot.
en.maududi: and so too did the people of Abraham and the people of Lot;
en.mubarakpuri: And the people of Ibrahim and the people of Lut,
en.pickthall: And the folk of Abraham and the folk of Lot;
en.qarai: [as well as] the people of Abraham and the people of Lot,
en.qaribullah: and the nation of Abraham and the nation of Lot;
en.sahih: And the people of Abraham and the people of Lot
en.sarwar: and the people of Abraham, Lot,
en.shakir: And the people of Ibrahim and the people of Lut,
en.wahiduddin: So did the people of Abraham and the people of Lot,
fa.ayati: و نيز قوم ابراهيم و قوم لوط،
fa.bahrampour: و نيز قوم ابراهيم و قوم لوط
fa.fooladvand: و [نيز] قوم ابراهيم و قوم لوط.
fa.ghomshei: و همچنین قوم ابراهیم و قوم لوط.
fa.khorramdel: و همچنین قوم ابراهیم (ابراهیم را) و قوم لوط (لوط را).
fa.khorramshahi: همچنین قوم ابراهیم و قوم لوط
fa.makarem: و همچنین قوم ابراهیم و قوم لوط؛
fa.moezzi: و قوم ابراهیم و قوم لوط
fa.mojtabavi: و قوم ابراهيم و قوم لوط،
fa.sadeqi: و (نیز) قوم ابراهیم و قوم لوط.
